allow: Bash(gh issue create --repo alekoHalkias/Emusync --title 'Popup may not appear in Steam Deck Gaming Mode — add notify-send fallback' --body 'In Steam Deck Gaming Mode, games run inside a `gamescope` Wayland compositor.
